transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator. This is Ava, how can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if my podiatrist is covered under my plan. My foot's been killing me.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sorry, the doctor's name is Dr. Renata Cole, over at Willowbrook Foot Clinic.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your plan?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Tom Baird, born March 3rd, 1979.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Tom. I see you're on the Horizon Silver PPO plan through Cascade Health. One moment while I check Dr. Cole's network status.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good news — Dr. Renata Cole at Willowbrook Foot Clinic is in-network under your plan. Your copay for a specialist visit would be thirty-five dollars.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh perfect, that's a relief. Do I need a referral or anything first?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No referral needed for this plan, just call and schedule directly. Anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks so much, Ava.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Tom. Take care of that foot, and have a great day.
